BatchDeleteAttributes.description: Grants permission to perform multiple DeleteAttributes operations in a single call, which reduces round trips and latencies

BatchPutAttributes.description: Grants permission to perform multiple PutAttribute operations in a single call, which reduces round trips and latencies

CreateDomain.description: Grants permission to create a new domain

DeleteAttributes.description: Grants permission to delete one or more attributes associated with the item

DeleteDomain.description: Grants permission to delete a domain

DomainMetadata.description: Grants permission to return information about the domain, including when the domain was created, the number of items and attributes, and the size of attribute names and values

GetAttributes.description: Grants permission to return all of the attributes associated with the item

GetExport.description: Grants permission to return information for an existing domain export arn

ListDomains.description: Grants permission to list all domains

ListExports.description: Grants permission to list all exports that were created. The results are paginated and can be filtered by domain name

PutAttributes.description: Grants permission to create or replace attributes in an item

Select.description: Grants permission to execute a query against the items in a domain

StartDomainExport.description: Grants permission to initiates the export of a SimpleDB domain to an S3 bucket
